park_name: Tasman Holiday Parks - Cairns Cool Waters

reviews.review_text: Very good site with excellent facilities. We didn't  have a working power lead but they kindly lent us one. Good service.

For budget accomodation, I stayed in the 2 Bedroom Family Unit with my 5 children and there was so much space. Kids loved the pool and visiting the fish and the turtles. Great value for money. And the playground/river around the corner in the neighbourhood is walking distance, fantastic to play and swim with your kids.

Camp is very mid - medicore - more like one of those caravan parks for …. Long term … “residents” than and holiday park - staff are pushy repeatedly calling and emailing demanding schedules and times - just leave and envelope like literally every other camp in the country! Which BTW is all they end up doing anyway - but they have to send you a barrage of phone calls and emails first - for a stay that is paid for in advance and non-refundable anyway - its clear they are just trying to money grab by double selling the site if you no show, either that or they just have a weird control fetish about needing to know your travel scehdule - and to thank-you for your business they will BOMBARD you with marketing emails - 29!!! Emails from a nights stay nearly four weeks ago.|Just don't stay here - its not worth it, theres no services around and the mosquitos are ridiculous its out in the middle of no where and not in a good way - narrow paths and roads, impossible for bigger rigs/setups, the map makes no sense.|And just to top it off - their contact page doesn't work so this feedback cant be given directly to them. - Happy Travels!

Camp is very mid - medicore - more like one of those caravan parks for …. Long term … “residents” than and holiday park - staff are pushy repeatedly calling and emailing demanding schedules and times - just leave and envelope like literally every other camp in the country! Which BTW is all they end up doing anyway - but they have to send you a barrage of phone calls and emails first - for a stay that is paid for in advance and non-refundable anyway - its clear they are just trying to money grab by double selling the site if you no show, either that or they just have a weird control fetish about needing to know your travel scehdule - and to thank-you for your business they will BOMBARD you with marketing emails - 29!!! Emails from a nights stay nearly four weeks ago.
Just don't stay here - its not worth it, theres no services around and the mosquitos are ridiculous its out in the middle of no where and not in a good way - narrow paths and roads, impossible for bigger rigs/setups, the map makes no sense.
And just to top it off - their contact page doesn't work so this feedback cant be given directly to them. - Happy Travels!
The property met our expectations in almost every aspect. We look forward to visiting again next year.

I stayed 2 nights on an unpowered site.|First the good:|- The park looks nice and green|- The pool area is nice and clean|- Clean bathroom|- No mozzies despite being next to the river ||The not-so-good:|- Kitchen isn't kitted out well, there's no utensils at all (pans, plates etc), just the basics (toaster, kettle, gas burner, BBQ), on my first night there wasn't even dish washing liquid|- I put my shoes on my site to let them dry and left, when I came back they were gone, never to be seen again (did ask in the office, they weren't handed in)|- I think it's a bit overpriced for an unpowered site, compared to the other caravan parks I stayed at for way less

Great location, self-catering cabins are brilliant everything you need to ensure that your stay is comfortable and the everyday conveniences are available. Bed are comfy so a good nights sleep making working the next day better. Staff from booking to check out have been fabulous and booking in staff for accommodation has been very good. If your stay is for short or long term Coolwaters here has been very good, recommendation from our staff staying has been excellent.

This place has been exceptional ladies quick to resposne to my never ending changes and requests for our staff when working nights has been excellent.

I stayed 2 nights on an unpowered site.
First the good:
- The park looks nice and green
- The pool area is nice and clean
- Clean bathroom
- No mozzies despite being next to the river

The not-so-good:
- Kitchen isn't kitted out well, there's no utensils at all (pans, plates etc), just the basics (toaster, kettle, gas burner, BBQ), on my first night there wasn't even dish washing liquid
- I put my shoes on my site to let them dry and left, when I came back they were gone, never to be seen again (did ask in the office, they weren't handed in)
- I think it's a bit overpriced for an unpowered site, compared to the other caravan parks I stayed at for way less

I have a permanent onsite van. Am really impressed with all staff and the amenities. Nice to have a pool and spa. And my puppy  is allowed as long as she is on her lead. Close to town and shoping centres.

We had a wonderful stay at this caravan park. It’s a quiet and well-maintained place with very friendly staff. The pool was lovely, the park was clean, and the café was a great addition. We were very happy with our cabin.|One of the highlights was the turtle and fish feeding—it was such a nice experience. There’s also a nearby park with a playground, and a short walk through the rainforest with beautiful scenery, which we really enjoyed.|The only downside was the constant noise from the highway next to the park. There were noisy cars, motorbikes, and even ambulances throughout the day and night, which did disturb the otherwise peaceful atmosphere.|Overall, we had a great time and would definitely come back.
Clean and tidy beautiful leafy area with a nice cool creek around the outside
Loved each tasman campground we stayed at.  Lots of shade, places to bbq, pools and restrooms were very clean
Very friendly and comfortable.  Would highly recommend

Absolutely Beautiful ❤️❤️
Nice and Quiet and Well Maintained
Great Value for Money, Beautiful River Surrounding the Property with Many Fish, Turtles etc

Booked 3 family, 3muns & 4kids + under2! I believe it has just renovated so very clean and everything fresh! Everyone has own beds and all mum could even bring their partners comfortably. The common pool, shower n toikets are also newer/ renovated or very well maintenance. Has own BBQ was a bonus.
Highly recommend

Value for dollar is very very poor.|Cairns has scores of better value holiday accommodation.  You'd be better off parking your caravan outside a hotel or motel.|Broken roads may be a reflection on the overall maintenance of the park, amenities and rooms. See photos.|Recently a caravan burst into flames and was destroyed. See photo.|It's weird ...a plumbing contractor,who lives elsewhere according to staff, uses the Holiday Park as his contracting storage area. His trucks and equipment comes and goes. Note the ramps on his truck- just the sort of thing children break their necks on.|Watch your children closely.|The pool area is great but the spa is on a timer and only lasts a few minutes.

The cabin was good, however no room service so lengthy stays may not be the best, especially since it is quite cramped if you are more than two people. However, two people or less and you will have the dream cabin- quite luxurious for this many people.

The people at the front desk are very nice! The serviced us well.

I couldn't have asked for better.i stayed with 2 cats for a week.
Great staff...excellent comfort and clean...is how I left it too.
Many thanks for a great product and pet friendly.
.happy new year
Amazing staff! Amazing camp and excellent surroundings, we have just finished our east coast trip and this was by far the best camp site :)

I stayed in the budget studio and paid $123 per night in the wet season so not high season. The studio was run down and in need of work. The photos on the website look much better than the real thing.
To top things off, had a cold shower the next morning as no hot water.
The park is beautiful and the cabin was clean . Just needs a major makeover.

My partner and I stayed for a few nights and absolutely loved it. In terms of facilities and price it was by far the best along our east coast trip. Thank you to all the staff who were very welcoming and helpful. It was fun feeding the turtles, and the pool and spa was lovely to chill in and socialise with other guests.
From the Londs ;)
Excellent
Pleasant campground with a pool. Saw bandicoots running around at night. Chilled out, peaceful vibe.

My favorite caravan park of the road trip! The sites are spacious, with nice privacy between each spot thanks to beautiful trees. The vegetation is stunning, the pool is super nice, and the bathrooms are always clean. Thanks to Emma, the French girl, for the warm welcome!
Packed in like sardines
Toller Camping Platz.  Wir haben uns hier mit unseren Kindern sehr wohl gefühlt. Schön grün, saubere und große Küche und moderne Bäder. Und dazu auch ein toller Pool mit Whirlpool.
Afterhours communication and checkin was good, but when we entered the fam suite the floors were not cleaned, some of the lights were also not working
Best park to stay at in cairns highly recommend and dog friendly

Firstly, very slippery pool and bathroom tiles! Please be extra careful (I’m not an oldie and had even still a few very scary moments)

Loved our stay here. Highly recommend the creek-front sites. SO worth the extra couple of dollars.

Powered site. |Kids loved the turtle sanctuary. Cafe had good coffee. Camp kitchen was well equipped. Nice walk through parklands close by. ||Amenities block near the camp kitchen was filthy most of the time. It appeared as though it wasn’t cleaned regularly. Overflowing bins, no soap, dirty floors, dirty showers and hairy floors, dirty and grimy shallow water in the mop bucket that was supposed to be used to mop the shower after use. Toilet door broken for days on end. I ended up walking to the top amenities block which was cleaner. ||I probably wouldn’t stay her if I had to use the amenities block.

For a costly price of 169 dollars for one night this was by the far the most awful place I have stayed at as a local. Absolutely none of the windows had locks on them including the ones in the bedroom and the security screen had no operational lock on it either. The bathroom basin was half rotted away from a water leak and was absolutely appalling and disgusting. For a one night stay we did not feel safe without lockable windows or screen door and was not satisfied with the state of our cabin. On top of this there was no room to park our car properly and had to park it around the corner near on the side of the road in the holiday park  $169 is an absolutely disgusting price for a one night stay in a horrible cabin. If I am paying this much money for accomodation I at least expect to feel safe and comfortable. I will not be staying here ever again even if it was the only option left. It surprises me you guys even make business with the horrific and careless state you leave your cabins in. 0/10 would not recommend.
Nice surrounds if you are further to the back. However, Cabins at front are very noisy with busy road traffic. Staff very helpful.

ONLY 15 min drive to CBD we stayed on creek side fresh water croc free so you can swim great facilities camp kitchen set is amazing food truck on Fridays and SMS updates on anything going on in park cya next year I will be back

We really enjoyed our stay here for the last week. Our cabin had a lovely outlook and was very spacious. There was a few issues with ants but we just figured we're in tropical Queensland! Could have done with another service as we ran out of amenities a few times. The pool area was absolutely splendid and clean. Loved our afternoons here. Also enjoyed the turtle sanctuary. Staff were kind and friendly. Overall a really great stay! Thanks team!

Amazing place to stay
Fantastic amenities.
Incredible seeing the fish , turtles , eels and goanna :)
Paid for an ‘upgraded’ cabin option - not value for money. Cleanliness, hygiene, functionality all need improvements. A ‘tired’ cabin that needs some renovation. Good location.
We are regular customers of the Tasman Big4 and find the facilities to be top quality the staff are friendly and professional.

What can I say, the cabins are just demountables but  comfortable and well appointed for what they are, the park is easy to get to and the staff are helpful, turning on the aircon for us before we arrived was a nice touch and appreciated.

Cute camping but Really far from the center. We were in a motel room and had some cockroach in the room, also a lot of tiny ants in the shower and the kitchen. The walls were also really thin so it was hard to sleep with the people making noise in the other rooms
Very accommodating  . Beautiful clean park
Floors felt oily, walls were mouldy and to top it off had to put the sheets on the bunk beds! Also you couldn’t actually lock the cabin door from the outside.
Lovely park we stayed in our van for 8 nights 🌙 amenities are new nice and clean

I would avoid This Place – Unethical and Disrespectful Treatment to us.

My wife recently booked a 6-night trip to Cairns for her mother (in her mid-70s with serious health issues, including sleep apnea) and her 16-year-old niece. She paid thousands of dollars for the entire holiday — including flights, tours, and accommodation — choosing the more expensive Daintree Cabins option specifically because it offered two separate sleeping areas, a veranda, and cooking facilities. This setup was essential for their comfort, given the medical equipment required and the need for space.

However, upon arrival, they were shocked to find that the cabin, which had been booked and confirmed months in advance, had been given away to another family. The staff told them that the other group was staying longer and therefore “worth more” to the park, so they simply changed the booking without notifying us.

To make matters worse, they were downgraded to a single-room cabin with one shared bed— completely inappropriate for a senior with medical needs and a teenager. The explanation from the staff was not only dismissive but offensive: “We saw it was a two-person booking and assumed it was a husband and wife, so we put you in the same bed.”

This was not just an inconvenience; it was a deliberate and unethical decision based on profit over basic respect for guests. My wife made thoughtful arrangements for her family’s wellbeing, and the blatant disregard shown by this company is disgusting.

I would strongly advise others to avoid booking here. If this is how they treat confirmed guests — especially elderly and vulnerable ones — then it’s clear they have no sense of accountability or integrity.
I'm in a caravan have a good site

I would not stay in a motel room again. The walls are so thin that you can hear every noise from the rooms next door. The cleaners and garden maintenance people are so noisy during the day. Hard to get a baby to have a nap when there's so much noise. Also there's no fenced play area for children or piece of grass they can run around on. The only enclosed area is the pool which isn't suitable as it's quite slippery. The reception staff seemed friendly though.
nice place, very conveniently and lively. the roads in the park are a bit tight though and expect some bugs.

We spent several nights recently (July 2025) and the park was spotless, not at all noisy (given how full it was), and the staff were lovely.  Very central Cairns location, with a huge dog park very close by.  We had a lovely cabin, although the bathroom was a little small, it was not unexpected.  I would recommend for anyone travelling with pets.
Tight sites but still roomy

Location is great but very jam packed areas to try navigate around in. Supposed “whole chalet” as advertised on booking.com was very small and bunks only would fit small children. Extremely noisy air-conditioner and useless wifi connection. Wouldn’t stay again. Easy check in and friendly staff, great cafe!
Very clean and quiet park

A beautiful spot to stay. Very clean and well maintained amenities. A beautiful pool, turtle sanctuary where you can feed the fish and a nice big camp kitchen area. Staff were excellent and very accommodating, they were very flexible and were able to fit us in when we asked to stay longer. This is exactly what is needed when you’re travelling around Australia. Would definitely stay here again.
Parked in powered RV site. Grassed with power water and sullage. Reception friendly and accomodating

A very pleasant caravan park to stay in.
Amenities and grounds are well maintained by management and staff.
Highly recommended.
Expensive for what you get. Facilities are not the best.
We were caravanning

I stayed here for 2 nights; I used a cabin that was not far into the park. Nice enough place with parking outside my cabin. Good air conditioning, Tv was small and limited, Bathroom and kitchen tools were good. The camp has some good points, the creek with fish and an eel. Swimming pool was good as well, Snacks available on site
Away from the hwy is beautiful doen by the creek.

Some spots a little tight, but excellent facilities, great pool.
Close to everything.
Don't go near the noisey washing machines sites they kept us awake until midnight .I won't stay there again
Clean and tidy accom, good amenities, friendly staff
Lovely surrounds 🌴🌴🌴🌺🌺🌺helpful staff 👍nice amenities 🚻

Cabins are loud, the bed is like a rock and our TV had no volume, no matter what settings I chose. |Many cabins share the same middle wall and floor, making it impossible to sleep if you have noisy neighbours. And the bed was that hard that I rolled around all night. Not worth $180
We had an excellent stay the staff were great the coffee van out the front was excellent great quiet park close to town
Really unhappy looking staff such a shame as park is really nice.

Tasman Holiday Parks – Cairns Cool Waters is a large and busy park that has everything you need for a comfortable stay. All the amenities were well-maintained and easily accessible, making it a convenient and hassle-free experience. Despite its size and popularity, the park runs smoothly and has a good atmosphere.

It was a great launching point for all our activities around Cairns – whether heading into the city, up to Kuranda, or out to explore the reef and rainforest. A solid, reliable place to base yourself while enjoying everything the region has to offer.
Beautiful lush tropical caravan park has a lovely creek running through. Lots of walking trails. Very friendly, helpful staff and great amenities.Very reasonably priced. 😊

Crystal clear water Creek with sandy Beach area for kids to play. Our spacious site was 146 with a slab and the running Creek behind us. A lovely clean pool and spa.  Showers in the small block were hot but lacked some water pressure.  The amenities were clean and can only keep clean if everyone tries to keep them tidy.  I did have only one day chase up the amenities staff to clean up one of the toilets.  Having a coffee shop there for drinks hot and cold,  smoothies were yummy.  Staff were friendly and helpful.
A great caravan park. Had a really nice site with plenty of room.  Amenities okay. Even found a couple of opals on site. Close to Skyrail & Kuranda.

Estuvimos durante 5 noches aquí y nos encantó el camping!
Es un lugar completamente equipado y los baños me encantaron, siempre estaban limpios y ordenados.
La secretaria que nos recibió fue súper amable y al hacer tantas noches, nos descontaron una.
Como negativo lo único que puedo decir es que había mucho ruido porque nuestro site estaba muy cerca de la ruta, pero creo que de haber reservado con más anticipación lo hubiésemos evitado. En otros lugares del camping se sentía mucho más silencioso y tranquilo
Great location.. tropical surroundings. Helpful staff. Clean toilets.. fully recommended to any traveler.

This place is a MUST stay!

We have only been here two days and we are in love. Nature is everywhere. All the plants are triple size and there is a running creek around the property that has fish and turtles.

Cabins are so clean and spacious. Plenty of cupboard space and easy parking. Big balconies with plenty of seats and tables.

Venue is dog friendly but only certain rooms. There is a secret creek walk that follows the water into an off leash dog friendly park that is so lush.

A beautiful big pool, laundry rec rooms with BBQs and fridges.

A cool little cafe called Turtle Cafe and they have food trucks come in on weekends.

Cannot rave enough!

As shown in the photo, the powered site we were assigned had the shared power box positioned on the other side, rather than in the middle as typically expected. This made it very inconvenient for us to access power and uncomfortable, as we had to step into the neighboring site, which felt intrusive.

Originally, we requested an unpowered site, but since none were available, we had to pay the full price for a powered site. Given the poor layout of the site we received, we felt this was unfair.

Additionally, there were quite a lot of mozzie in the area, which made the stay less pleasant.
Room was clean and tidy, bed was a little hard though. Staff were friendly. Nice cafe at reception 👌

Cabine moderne, propre.
Le camping en lui même est très jolie.
Sanitaires nickels.

Self contained clean modern cabins but pokey cramped showers. You share a wall with your neighbour contrary to the reception saying they were stand alone units. Tight parking spaces infront of units with other drivers driving too fast down the skinny lanes. Prices on the high side

Wunderschöne Anlage . Die Damen an der Rezeption war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.
Die Anlage ist sehr sauber und grün . Verfügt über einen Bach in dem viele Fische und Schildkröten zu sehen sind . Die Zimmer sind sehr sauber und gepflegt. Mit voller Ausstattung .
Very nice place in Cairns to stay for holidays.

Lovely 2 bedroom place we stayed at Turtle Cottage for 2 nights. Loved the main bedroom having no windows. Had to request to get a leaking tap fixed which it was very promptly. The only negative feedback was all the leaves from the verandah were always coming inside & the main queen bed mattress was far too soft, feeling like we were going to fall through it onto the floor. The other negative was that it did not have any kids playground & the spa pool next to the pool was not working and not warm as we were expecting.

Great spot, but service depends on who’s on

Had an amazing stay here last week — arrived after 6pm and was warmly welcomed by ‘T’. Great vibe, and I loved the morning swim in the river! It quickly became my favourite park in Cairns.

Tried to return tonight and called the after-hours number on the door as before. This time I was told there was “nothing she could do” since the system was off — even though that was also the case last time, and cash payment wasn’t an issue then.

I’ve never been turned away from a park on my whole lap of Oz, so this was a first. Seems like your experience here really depends on who’s on call. Bit gutted, honestly.

Very nice clean park with plenty of different budget options.  The only one thing against the park is the Road noise....especially trucks at night using exhaust brakes.  Not the Parks fault though, great location and amenities.Close to a shopping Centre, not far into the City of Cairns either. The reception staff are very friendly.

We have stayed here twice now with our cats and birds, the staff are friendly. The facilities are great, the rooms are very nice and have everything you need.

Very pretty place to stay in Cairns 🖤
Get little spot to get a sleep in. $181
Great location, awesome park, opportunity to feed turtles, great pool and rec room. Clean amenities, This holiday park is by far one of the better ones we have stayed at in a while.
We stay here on a regular basis , and will be back 👌
Stayed in the container cabin.  It was superb.  Lovely inside with decking surround.  There are plenty of eating options nearby if you don't want to cook.  Also, it's not too far out of CBD.

This place is really nice. We stayed our final week in Cairns before heading overseas in a pretty friendly cabin with our two dogs and it was super comfortable. The grounds are well maintained and the facilities are very clean.
Upon check in the staff were friendly, informative and this has been the standard throughout our stay here.
There's a hidden little gem by reception called Angee's Diner that makes great coffee and meals as well.
All in all it's been a great retreat here for a week, I would highly recommend stopping in for a stay.

Amazing campsite with really good facilities, the bathrooms and kitchen area are very clean. The pool has also just been refurbished which was great.  Staff are very friendly and welcoming! We also couldn’t believe how reasonable the prices were to stay here which was an added bonus. |Would highly recommend staying here.
Wunderschöner Campground mit Fluß,  vielen Bäumen und Palmen 🌴,  zentral gelegen. Sehr saubere sanitäre Anlagen.

Location is great, out of town but close enough to both the city and beaches. Servo 2 min walk away and Redlynch shops only short drive. Plus several local swimming holes near by. Well maintained park with friendly helpful staff. With everything on offer here, it was still one of the cheaper places we looked, would stay here again.

Wirklich schöner CP, gepflegt und schattig. Sanitäranlagen und Cooling-Area sehr sauber. Der Strand ist winzig und wird anscheinend auch nicht genutzt, der Pool war wegen Renovierung leider geschlossen (Nov 2024).|In der Seitenstraße gegenüber ist eine Bushaltestelle, für 0,50 AUD kommt man zur Esplanade, ca. 45 min.|Wir haben hier 4 Nächte verbracht.
Ok pour quelques nuits. Proche du Skytrail (à ne surtout pas manquer). La suite un peu désuète et sombre, propreté correcte, assez tranquille même si proche d’une grande route.

We had a fun and enjoyable stay here in a self contained cabin. The park is located an easy 15 min drive from the city center. Inside the park feels safe and staff and other guests were really friendly. Cabins were small but comfortable, nothing flash but totally adequate for us. Stand out experience is feeding the fish and turtles in the river that runs out the back of the park. We enjoyed the pizza truck that came one night and the convenience of the cafe on site. Highly recommended

Great location- excellent staff, so very helpful.
Thankyou
We will stay again definitely.
Nice campground, clean facilities, nice staff, small sites. Some renovations are currently done. Wifi free but worthless.

The best caravan Park in cairns but not only that, it's also the best staff we've met! We had a problem with our car which was stuck in the garage, so we extended our stay and the staff went out of their way to find last minute solutions to make us feel at home!

We would like to thank the entire Tasman team, from the secretariat to the housekeeping staff, for all their help and kindness.

The toilets are clean, the kitchen is large and the pitches are great!

Don't hesitate, come and stay at Tasman Cairns!

Many thanks to the whole team and to Mick for his help! 💪

We stayed for 4 nights from Saturday 5th October 2024 to Wednesday 9th October 2024 - me, my wife and two daughters aged 15 years old and 4 years old. During our stay, we found cockroaches inside our Dain tree cabin which was located just opposite the tiny pool (size of pool grossly disproportionate with the number of guests on site at any one time) with built in spa.
On day 2, we found a large cockroach  inside our bedroom closet which I got rid of and roach eggs on the floor between the bunk bed and bedroom. On day 3, another large roach came running from under the black couch (shared lounge / kitchen area) into our bedroom then no where to be found. Again found roach eggs on the bedroom floor. As an added bonus, insects formed on the cornices inside our bedroom which I had to clean up - I reckon they had to be there prior to our arrival but we did not take notice.
Mind you I contacted the property directly on 3 separate occasions as Booking.com was confusing as hell in pricing providing similar descriptions for all rooms. They told me the cabin was not occupied prior therefore I could check in at 12pm instead of 2pm. One would think that a room inspection would be standard procedure prior to customers checking in or entering the cabin. When confronted, the supervisor on duty (no self introduction or had a name badge.....Shannon Derksen according to emails sent to my gmail account) was not receptive or showed any interest or empathy to my situation. Shannon, FYI - reputation is everything in the tourism business. Belinda at reception was helpful (after recommending what she should do) but could not relocate us to another room citing no vacancies when in fact, the cabin next to us 29B was vacant. The occupiers had left on the day or before the day - their car wasn't there and no one inside the cabin during the day or night. When I asked Shannon if the cabin was cleaned and fumigated while we were out as arranged, she said yes but her body language said I don't really care, as though she wanted to leave the conversation. I informed her that the toilet floor wasn't cleaned which it wasn't because 2 white towels were wet and placed on the floor just before the shower base / toilet bin wasn't emptied. There was no exhaust fan in the bathroom/toilet which I thought was unusual.
It would be common sense to me that it should be cleaned as roaches will go anywhere and everywhere. Shannon became defensive telling me that she was there with the staff member who cleaned our cabin and told me I said to Belinda not to touch the toilet which was not true. I have my wife and 2 daughters who should not live in fear/anxiety and be exposed to such an unpleasant experience. Insects I understand but to be treated like rubbish by another human being is ridiculous.
Each of us also left the cabin with insect bites on our arms, hands and neck areas.
On day 2, the pool was closed for renovations. There was no notification about this at all prebooking nor when upon check-in, so we missed out on going into the pool. In hindsight with the way things were going, probably a good thing otherwise I would have to type another paragraph.
To the CEO of Tasman Holiday Parks, Ms Nikki MILNE, I could operate your caravan park so much better than any of the staff on site. It seems none of them have any experience in customer service or have any experience with thinking on their feet. To think I paid AUD$870 via Booking.com for this exhilarating experience. Zero care factor from Shannon - try smiling or even pretend you like your job just for 2 minutes. Alternatively, this review would be the repercussion. As a previous small business owner and international traveller, the customer service and professionalism I experienced at Tasman Holiday Parks - Cool Waters is so much worse than those offered in third world countries non-English speaking....at least over there they are grateful for even having a job to support their families. It is ironic how there are so many glowing reviews online however for whatever the reason I got the short end of the stick.

Love this caravan park, we always come here if coming to Cairns. Lots of powered sites, cabins and 2 amenitie blocks and kept cleaned. Great size pool as well, grounds kept cleaned and all staff so friendly and polite. Dog friendly as well and nice walk to creek were your dogs or kids can swim. Nice size camp kitchen.

Someone stolen our clothes WHILE being drying on the laundry ON CCTV!!!
I just went to the reception to ask for the cameras (IT IS A CAMERA ON THE CORNER) and the recepcionist said: “Sorry the cameras was installed to avoid our staff stealing the coins of the laundry machines, so I can’t help you with that, they are not working currently”Not only they don’t trust their staff but they can’t fix the cameras… They said: is not ”our responsibility if someone took the clothes” Come on, of course I’m not assuming you took it but at least help as minimum to ask every single host that probably took it by mistake or stole it, THIS IS A CARELESS COSTUMER SERVICE.
Long story short: No responsibility and really poor attention to the costumer by reception, didn’t even took my details to let me know if they will do something or not, I’ll never come back again, sarcastic attitude.
Great powered site, very peaceful great amenities
Alles tiptop. Schöne Stellplätze und saubere Toiletten und Duschen.
I will recommend  this very good to stay silent clean toilet
Nice, available near Cairns, but first night out site was really noisy.
Nice spot, well shaded and good facilities.

This park is exactly what our family needed. Our accommodation was clean and had everything we could want to have a comfortable stay. The whole family loved the pool area. The gardens were lush and well maintained. Will definitely be back!
Loved this park, beautiful gardens, great little creek you can swim in and a coffee shop on site!

Nice park. Some of internal roads / sites a bit tight but the park has a good feel about it. Staff friendly & services adequate. Was concerned about proximity to main Rd, but most of caravan sites are at back & had no problems.
Il miglior campeggio della città, in una zona tranquilla a due passi da un bel fiume e un grande parco
Great facilities and location.
Great spot if you have dogs, if it had a playground for kids it would be 5 stars

Sehr sauberes Bad und Wc.
Die Anlage ist sehr schön und gut gepflegt, sehr toll sind die vielen Pflanzen die einem schatten spenden.
Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.

This place is amazing - great location. Fantastic sites and amenities - and a fresh water creek flows around the boundary - simply refreshing.
Pet friendly and Goomoora Park for off lead dog exercise just around the corner or follow the creek.
Nice cabin, but a bit of road noise

The staff are friendly, the gardens are lovely but oh my do they jam them in. We had very little room to manoeuvre our van onto the site. Resulted in damage to our vehicle trying to get the vehicle into position.. Not happy and certainly won't be back.

Bathrooms are especially clean …. Always
Have live music on Fridays with pizza nights Thursdays and Fridays…

Staff are friendly and nothing is a problem that they can’t solve
Beautiful park very tranquil setting. Well maintained toilets and showers.great laundry. Very friendly and helpful staff. Great walkway to park. Bus 3 minutes walk.

Der Campingplatz ist schön angelegt.
Die Sanitären Einrichtungen sind schon sehr alt, aber sauber.
Die Motel Häuschen sind sehr runter gekommen, in einem nicht guten Zustand.
Es wurde aber an einzelnen Häuschen gearbeitet,  also vielleicht ändert es sich ja bald.
Die Sauberkeit ist aber okay.
Der Standort des Resorts ist super um alle bekannten Aktivitäten zu erreichen.
Terrible paper thin walls lead to no sleep

Excellent caravan park so clean and tidy and staff are friendly. They go beyond and above to help you.
The gardens at Cool Waters are amazing the gardeners are out everyday maintaining, tidying and cleaning up. They do an amazing job!!!!
Sites are lovely and clean
This is one of the best parks we have stayed at and will continuing coming back.
Thanks 😊
Nice clean rooms for a short stay

Stayed here in July in one of the cottages. Overall good stay, no night noise, good aircon, modern facilities in the room.

A couple things that brought it down, there were doors in the room that join the next door cabin and you can hear the neighboring tenants talking eating etc.. That was right near where I slept (although it was their kitchen area so at night it was quiet). There was a lack of ppts in the room (and one socket was not working), plus very narrow crowded driveways.

Positive, a new shower with good pressure, new microwave TV, fridge and kitchenette facilities, great price, really easy to drive to, nice and scenic.
You get what you pay.

I would suggest to stay away from this caravan park. We had a Nightmare stay from March through till April 2024. They have no security at all. I had several dangerous situations occur while staying at Tasmans Cool Waters Caravan Park. It started with a local ice affected drug addict trying to enter my van and steal stuff while I was inside watching TV at night. Next door they got into a backpacker van with 3 girls and wouldnt leave trying to steal stuff,they scared asked me for my help. They rang security and a 50s plus woman, the kiwi gardner came and she did nothing. She confirmed they cant stop the problem and the drug affected woman had tried 10-20 other cabins and caravans bf us. The permanent Cabins are filled with drunks and drug addicts and noise goes till 2-3am with yelling and screaming all the time. Management and staffs attitude is unhelpful and rude. Next I camped by the creek and got flooded and almost drowned as I got washed into the creek. I luckily saved myself and then 2 other families with small kids that were asleep and sitting in 3 feet of flood water and didnt know. I rang management and they werent bothered at all. Oh yes the sites flood regularly when Copperlode dam is full the water overflows into the creek. Crystal cascades is closed by council due to danger to the public but Tasman caravan park is allowed to put people in danger. Check how full Copperlode Dam and Tinnaroo dams are before staying because any rain will overspill and flood you like it did me and did all through summer 2024. A family 2 days prior to my arrival was told to move sites by staff as they expected rain and the sites will flood again yet they put me and 2 other families on the same sites that flood. The caravan park floods regularly and they will not warn or help you...I learned the hard way...They have no compassion or empathy as copperlode dam over flows into freshwater creek continually. 3 foot of raging water moving 20-30km per hour washed all my goods away and debri smashed my caravan and car and Tasman blame council and wont pay me the $24,000 damaged caused, they wont change things to protect future guests from flooding events or drug addicts or drunks entering and living in the park. Park management and their senior management only care about $$$$$$$$$ and have shown me no remorse or compassion........

We stayed here for 9 days and we had a sweet spot down near the river, plus the staff were friendly and so helpful.

Most mornings we would have a coffee and hot chocolate from the cafe outside the reception and you would be greeted by Billy the beautiful bulldog and the cafe owners are so lovely and they make great coffee and hot chocolates and home made choc chip cookies.
Nice holiday park. No complaints

Sites are tight but very pretty on a running creek. Plenty of fish and turtles and some good size Barra. No fishing signs everywhere but as usual people fishing. We achieved what we needed to do in a city.
Room didn’t look like the pictures at all, coconut cabin, book with care. Good wifi
Located 7ish km from Cairns. No trouble, no late night noise. Nice safe swim in the creek at the back of the park.
Great experience here. Lots to do here. Great amenities.lovely pool and jacuzzi.

One if not the best site we have stayed at, and we have been on the road along the east coast for 6 months!!
Firstly the staff are absolutely wonderful, all the ladies at the front desk are gems to talk to and super helpful. I extended my stay from 4 nights to 2 and a half weeks, mainly talking with one women (forgot her name) who was so helpful, and even helped us find a hotel close to the airport for when we were leaving!
The amenities are super clean, they do get pretty busy and it’s a large park with a lot of people, but very clean and well kept. Hot water all day and night considering the forementioned.
The grounds are so well kept, being here for two weeks now, we have seen so many people come and go, and every time they mow the grass, cut back the leaves and plants for the next camper.
And the pool!! Is crystal clear, being from the pool industry in the UK I have seen some questionable pools on camp sites in Aus and this one is the best!! Yes the spa isn’t heated but when you’re in tropical Queensland why would you get in a hot pool?
And the site is only a 10 minute drive from central, buses are limited but not camps fault.
Overall, wish we could stay longer!!! Loved loved loved 🤍

The place and the people working there are magnificent but unfortunately it’s not really connected to the city centre so you always have to get a taxi or an Uber to go out at night. There’s only one bus going every hour until 6 pm that is obviously not the campings fault. Overall, it was pretty good.

This was the most dog friendly Caravan Park we’ve been in! It’s a 2min walk to the best dog park where the dogs can swim in croc-free water:) +the little coffee place next to the reception is dog friendly, thanks to billy and her dad:) The sites were green and it felt quite private next to the river.

Was here for a week..Such a big park,vans jammed in so close to each other, roads were 2 way and very narrow with only enough room for one vehicle and just enough room for our friends and our motorhomes to drive on not safe at all. amenities cleaned but ran out of soap and hand towels twice.  Don't think I  would stay here again

As with almost everywhere we have been since COVID lockdowns they are lacking on the maintenance side of things but you can see that they are actively trying to catch up with that. The park is a little squashy in some parts, especially when it is very full, the amenities are clean and well maintained, they have quite a nice camp kitchen area and the pool and spa area are small but inviting. Probably not great for kids, but perfect for ourselves. Best of all with us it is pet friendly.
Great park with all the mond cons that you need clean amenities

Cabin was nothing like pictured, outdated.
Parking was a nightmare, except if you have a very small car. Was a disappointment.

Anmeldung per Anruf war anstrengend, hat aber letztendlich geklappt. Unterlagen mit Stellplatzbeschreibung war hinterlegt. Reinigungsplan im Waschhaus nicht vorhanden. Schön aber am Creek gelegen mit vielen Fischen und Schildkröten.
Is a lovely place well maintained site with beautiful nature but very close to the Main road so my Cabin was too close to extremely laud traffic.

IN OUR TOP THREE!!
Having travelled Australia/ New Zealand we’ve stayed at over 50 caravan parks and this is one of the best!

We stayed at this park over 2 weeks staying on powered sites and then in a Cabin. Kate on reception is brilliant and very helpful. Offered us a cheaper version of accommodation that wasn’t available online when we needed to stay in a room.
The Rec room is brilliant has aircon and fans with cooking facilities and plenty of utensils.  Ping pong table and smart TV which helps with killing some time in the evenings.
What a great caravan park !!!
Beautiful surrounds, lovely cabin , nice and clean and comfortable
I was traveling with my parrot and we needed a night to stay in cairns. The cabin was clean and exactly what we needed! The ladies at the front desk we super friendly. Definitely recommend!
had a great time fishing with friends and family good owners let you fish down to earth guy lets you fish and even ate them with us
Schöner Campingplatz mit Wasserschiltkröten

We stayed for 3 weeks.
This is a lovely clean and well maintained park. The camp kitchen is excellent. The pool area lovely.The staff were all friendly and helpful and the setting is just gorgeous. Highly recommend this Park and would definitely stay again.
Nice relaxing park, close to the city and beaches.
A bit noisy with traffic but when door is closed. Quiet.
Stayed with our camper a couple of nights. Nice spot near the creek. Fun experience feeding the turtles. Nice and clean pool and toilets

Stayed at a creekside camp spot which was great. Bit tricky to reverse into, but worth it for the location. Was able to see carp, Barras and turtles. Unable to fish. Staff were welcoming and friendly. Amenities were updated and spotless.
We don’t normally have an issue with staying at dog friendly parks, but felt that some of the dog owners didn’t respect the rules as we witnessed 2 incidents during our stay. 1 dog near our spot got attacked by another dog that got loose at 4am and was harmed. The owners of the naughty dog were just moved to another part of the park. The 2nd incident was when a dog owner allowed her unleashed dog to swim in the park pool when my children were in there playing. When she was questioned about doing this as the dog jumped at one of my kids, she didn’t seem bothered or apologetic and carried on. We also witnessed a few times dogs unleashed. This experience has now made us more wary about booking into a dog friendly parks in future thanks to the thoughtless selfish dog owners at this one 😟

I really enjoyed staying here. I stayed in a cabin which was well maintained, clean and cool. Small fridge, dual hot plate, microwave, kettle, cutlery, cups and more. Amenities were fine with good water flow. Parking was a bit hard with the motel rooms/parking right on the other side of the cabin parking. I will stay here again.

Powered Caravan site.
Spacious and well situated to Ammenities & Pool.

Sehr wenige und schmutzige Toiletten und Duschen, auch die Küche ist echt nicht schön. Nachts sind Vögel extrem laut, sodass man ständig aufwacht. Wir hatten das Pech, genau vor der Campküche zu schlafen. Also hat es den ganzen Abend nach BBQ gerochen und andere Gäste waren extrem laut. Aber der Campingplatz hat auch positive Eigenschaften: man kann Schildkröten sehen und füttern und es ist durch die vielen Pflanzen ein schöner Ort. Das Personal war sehr nett!

If you can get past the abhorrent, disrespectful and high school cliche staff - this place is beautiful. The staff sadly are profoundly unprofessional and leave nothing bar a sour taste in your mouth. The amount of times I had to check myself and say to myself, just leave it. The fact I even wanted to exercise my rights to now want to enforce ‘mutual respect’ was really disappointing. Change the staff then it’s a 10/10. Keep the staff and its a low 1/10.

Wir haben anfangs Oktober diesen Jahres 1 Nacht auf diesem Campground verbracht. Wir hatten das Glück, einen Powered Site in einer ruhigen Ecke zugeteilt bekommen zu haben. Die Plätze zur Strasse hin sind doch sehr lärmig. Der Aufenthalt war, bis auf die sehr schmutzigen und zu kleinen sanitären Anlagen ok.
Fantastic  powered  sites, friendly staff
Excellent layout, always clean & tidy with a great atmosphere.

The owner are friendly and really nice
Loved the river with the turtle 🐢

This camping is the best in cairns . By far
We've been in the other , and run away back to Tasman .
Modern clean amenities
The WiFi is super fast
Some site are small , but relatively bigger than the other option in cairns . So make sure you give a look before you book
Nice place, staff are friendly, the amenities are clean, garden immaculately looking good
Lovely park. Great kitchen and facilities
Lots of vans, friendly spot, even had pizzas cooked at the gate

My family and i have stayed at lots of tourist parks and this is definitely the worst i Have stayed at. On top of being cramped, dated and poorly maintained my car was damaged and we had our cutlery stolen from the camp kitchen. In regards to the car it was hit by a young boy riding his bike damaging the door,  the mother of the child said because it was an accident it wasn't her responsibility and I should get it fixed myself. I approached management for help assuming they could mediate a resolution,  however they said there was nothing at all they could do. This is despite the incident being reported to them by a separate witness. In regards to the cutlery the whole incident was caught on CCTV yet all they did was text the person responsible and when he didn't return their message they contacted us and said they couldn't track him down. He was staying in their park at site 78 but they couldn't locate him????????
I would never stay here again nor would I recommend anyone else stay at this park.

Booked months ago over the phone as wanted two sites next to each other for 23 ft vans. Arrived to be told couldn’t have two sites together and were told “if you’re travelling together you don’t want to be camped together” and if you don’t like this we will refund you your money knowing full well you’re not going to be able to book anywhere else. One site was ok the other site we could not even get the car off the road as the site was too small. Park was beautiful pity you are so poor at doing the bookings and not communicating until we are at the park.
Great location, very clean and tidy room. Pet friendly. Late check in made very easy.
Love staying here. Staff are great and the location convenient and welcoming. It's very family and pet friendly being adjacent to parkland, bikeways and off leash parkland

Booked months ago, requested a larger site being a camper trailer and needing room to set up a gazebo outside which has come in handy with the wet weather. Arrived to be told we had been put on another site since we were just a camper trailer, it was uneven and small. We did get moved however our choices were both very cramped notnto mention hardly room to drive around and get vehiclesnin and out of sites. We are now sitting in a mud pool apart from the concrete slab with barely enough room (our gazebo is in the garden). We cant use any of the space on our site beacause its literally a pool of mud. Drainage here is a huge problem, given its a rainy area this is something I thought would be done better. The site next to us is in a river of mud. The facilities aren't very clean, and things are in general run down like the playground. The spa isn't heated (I'm not the only guest who assumed a spa would be heated). Advertised as a lovely ground but actually one of the worst we have stayed at cramped and just shoving people in to make money without maintaining facilities or even having enough facilities for guests. Very disappointed

Editing to 1 star to add last night there was a loud band playing in the camp kitchen organised by the park (really close proximity to campers) until 9pm. Didn't know it was happening until posted the night before and expected it would finish at a decent hour for kids to get to sleep but it went until 9pm. This park has been nothing short of disappointment I would not recommend unless maybe you stayed in a cabin. But as a camper definitely not
Very cramped park, but,thankfully amazing ground staff who helped me immensely get into my site .
Wonderful Wonderful willl be back
Clean amenities. lovely staff. Great spot.good size sites
Very tight for caravans, our site was nice and level and had a nice dividing garden/hedge, the park has a nice tropical vibe, mostly clean and tidy. Check in after 12 for caravans

Great facilities and friendly staff. Thank you for organising the Kuranda rail and skyrail for us before we arrived. We had a fantastic time at Kuranda. The park is close to Goomboora Park, which is a good 4 km walk or bike ride. Close to shops and not far to the beach via car.
Beautifully set among the rainforest and right on the river, this caravan park its well maintained and with great facilities! We would most definitely stay again!

Stayed 2 nights here. First night the room was very very run down and a bit dirty. Payed $150 for it. Second night payed the same price for a room that was nothing like the first. It was modern clean and the up keep was completely different. So very dissatisfying to know that you pay the same price.

Pool was nice and the camp grounds looked nice and maintained.
Fun

It’s really great here, they have turtles, they have eels, they have streams, this is the best RV park I have ever stayed in, they have their own swimming pool, they have many toilets and kitchens, I give this evaluation  Five stars, here is really worth visiting again!  I have another chance to come to Cairns next time, I will come back here again
Very nice stay, nice and quiet

Nous avons passé le maximum de temps de ce camping, 42 jours ...

Nous avons payer entre 215 et 150 par semaines  pour 2 sans tente nis camping-cars ( nous dormions dans notre voiture ) .
Les tarifs changent en fonction des saisons et évènements ( vacances , jours férié...) .
ATTENTION  les prix peuvent doublé...

Ce camping est magnifique,  à 15 min du centre ville , dans la nature à côté d'une rivière très agréable où il y a des poissons ( pêche interdite ) et des tortue 🐢.
Possibilité de se baigner mais un peu plus loin ...

Il y a plusieurs douches et toilettes , assez bien entretenus,  des machines à laver ( 4$) et sèche linge (4$) .
Vous avez Possibilité d'acheter à l'accueil de la lessive en poudre ou liquide (1$) et d'autres choses si besoins comme nourriture et basique pour la toilettes ...

⚠️ bien mettre votre noms sur vos affaire dans le frigo qu'ils ont , ils n'hésitent pas à le vider pour le nettoyer et laisser de la place aux autres arrivant ... Ils me l'ont fait ( 40$) de courses à la poubelle ...
Le frigo est très petit mais ne peuvent pas en mettre un plus gros alors il n'y a rien à faire , c'est comme ça,  bon courage pour trouver de la place 😅.

Le WiFi est pas top mais les personnes  aux camping sont vraiment sympa alors la cuisine est vraiment un lieu de rencontre avec les habitants du camping , où les gens discutent, nous avons adoré les moments  partagé la bas.
3 barbecue et 2 plaques chauffante à gaz ( 4 pièces) .

Pizza tout les vendredi et camionnette à café et petit déjeuner tout les matin sur place ...☕️🍪🥞🥪
La piscine est plutôt sympa ...
Beaucoup de famille avec enfants ...
Beaucoup de petits chiens trop mimi 🥰

L'arrêt de bus est juste en face pour se rendre en ville ( bus toutes les heures) .

Merci beaucoup pour ce temps passez de ce merveilleux camping ..
On recommande !!

Merci et à bientôt 🙋‍♀️😊
Nice clean and tidy park, nice amenities, would recommend.
